description: Get detailed information about a specific chime

fields.name: modelKey
fields.description: The model key of the chime

fields.name: mac
fields.description: The MAC address of the device

fields.name: cameraIds
fields.description: The list of (doorbell-only) cameras which this chime is paired to.

fields.name: ringSettings
fields.description: List of custom ringtone settings for (doorbell-only) cameras paired to this chime.

children.name: cameraId
children.description: Which paired (doorbell-only) camera do these settings refer to.

children.name: repeatTimes
children.description: How many times should the ringtone be repeated

children.name: ringtoneId
children.description: The ID of the ringtone that should be played when the (doorbell-only) camera is rung.

children.name: volume
children.description: How loud should the ringtone be played. 0 being silent and 100 the loudest.

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/protect/integration/v1/chimes/{id}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get chime details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/chimes/{id}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/protect/integration/v1/chimes/{id}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get chime details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/chimes/{id}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
